description_long: This is a vintage portable radio receiver with a rectangular body covered in worn, reddish-brown leather or leatherette material. The front features a large metallic speaker grille with a unique, asymmetrical design, a circular tuning dial with a transparent cover, and a gold-colored trim. There is a white plastic or bakelite handle attached to the top for carrying, and the top panel includes several control knobs and switches. The back panel is plain except for a rectangular vent or label area and two metallic feet. The radio shows signs of age and use, with scuffs and discoloration on its surface, giving it a classic, retro appearance.
description: A vintage, portable radio receiver with a reddish-brown leather exterior, metallic speaker grille, circular tuning dial, and a white carrying handle. The object shows visible wear and retro design details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the radio, the white handle, and the textured reddish-brown surface.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the metallic speaker grille, circular tuning dial, gold trim, and visible brand logo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the handle and the radio's depth.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain reddish-brown back with a rectangular vent or label and two metallic feet.
